sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17917" key="au)to/skeuos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτό-σκευος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n17917.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">αὐτουργός</ref> </xr> II, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:14" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.14</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">artless,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φύσεως ἔρευθος αὐ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
